titles.title: I'm Not Ashamed of the Gospel

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're an anchor for those who are hurting, We're a harbor for those who are lost; Sometimes it's not always easy bearing Calvary's cross.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We've been ridiculed by those who don't know Him, And mocked by those who don't believe; Still I love standing up for my Jesus, Because of all that He's done for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That's why I'm not ashamed of the Gospel, The Gospel of Jesus Christ; No, I'm not afraid to be counted, But I'm willing to give my life. See I'm ready to be all He wants me to be, To give up the wrong for the right; No, I'm not ashamed of the Gospel Of Jesus Christ.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For every moment His hand has held mercy, For all the love that He's shown all my life; A simple thanks doesn't say how I'm feeling, I get tears in my eyes. So as for me I'm gonna keep on believing, In the One who's been so faithful to me; I'm not out to please this whole world around me, I've got my mind on Eternity.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've got too much behind me, to let this world blind me, To some He's a name, but to me He's my everything, (No) I'm not ashamed of the Gospel Of Jesus Christ.
